name: squad-ai
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects Squad, the AI‑powered product‑discovery and strategy platform to any MCP‑aware large‑language‑model (LLM) application. It exposes a rich tool‑kit for creating, querying and updating product‑strategy artefacts (opportunities, solutions, outcomes, requirements, knowledge, workspaces and feedback) directly from your favourite AI product co‑pilot.
